# Finca Los Castanos

> Historic coffee plantation in the Valle de Agaete, Gran Canaria, Spain. Europe's only coffee-growing region.

## About

Finca Los Castanos is a working coffee plantation located in the Valle de Agaete on Gran Canaria, Canary Islands, Spain. The finca offers guided coffee tours, holiday apartments, and event hosting in a unique tropical setting surrounded by coffee, avocado, mango, and papaya trees.

## Location

- Address: Camino de Los Romeros S/N, 35489 Agaete, Las Palmas, Spain
- Coordinates: 28.0810937, -15.6731384
- Region: Valle de Agaete, Gran Canaria, Canary Islands

## Services

### Coffee Tour
- Duration: 45 minutes
- Price: 16 EUR (online) / 18 EUR (on-site) per adult
- Children (5-12): 6 EUR (online) / 7.50 EUR (on-site)
- Infants (0-4): Free
- Includes: Guided plantation walk and coffee tasting
- Languages: Spanish, English, German
- Booking: https://fincaloscastanos.com/en/book-coffee-tour

### Holiday Apartments
Two vacation rentals on the plantation:

1. **Casa Los Castanos** - Up to 4 guests, 2 rooms, full kitchen, terrace, WiFi, air conditioning
2. **Cabana en Finca** - Up to 2 guests, 1 room, kitchenette, terrace, WiFi

Booking: https://fincaloscastanos.com/en/book

### Events
- Event tent for up to 75 guests
- Accessible venue with parking
- WiFi, climate control, restrooms
- Contact for events: +34 682 64 45 41

## Contact

- Phone: +34 648 22 99 95
- Email: info@fincaloscastanos.com
- Website: https://fincaloscastanos.com

## Opening Hours

- Monday-Friday: 09:00-15:00
- Saturday-Sunday: 10:00-14:00

Website available in English (default), Spanish, and German.

- English: https://fincaloscastanos.com (default)
- Spanish: https://fincaloscastanos.com/es
- German: https://fincaloscastanos.com/de
